stories.title: What we're hearing on 32 NFL contract negotiations...
stories.summary: Our reporters have the latest buzz on 32 contract extension candidates -- one from every team -- and their potential new deals.

stories.title: Lakers' Reaves intends to sign a $185M extension
stories.summary: Lakers star Austin Reaves intends to sign a four-year, $185 million maximum contract to return to the franchise, with a player option for the final season in 2029-30, sources tell ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Mets move scuffling Senga to bullpen after loss
stories.summary: Mets manager Carlos Mendoza said right-hander Kodai Senga has been demoted to the bullpen and did not rule out of the possibility of left fielder Juan Soto going on the injured list after he exited Tuesday's game with back tightness.

stories.title: Shields to face unified middleweight champ Scott
stories.summary: Claressa Shields, the undisputed women's heavyweight champion, will move down three divisions to challenge unified middleweight champion Kaye Scott for her WBA and WBC titles on Aug. 15.

stories.title: Cubs lose two starters as Brown, Cabrera to IL
stories.summary: Cubs right-hander Ben Brown is joining fellow righty Edward Cabrera on the sideline, as both pitchers have been placed on the 15-day injured list.
